_comment: Conditional inserts by chart or by day · clash days · harmony days · directions · colors · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026)

chong_personal.line: Today clashes with your birth year — the day's energy hits your chart head-on. Big moves, signings, launches, long trips: postpone what can be postponed. If you can't, leave extra time, double-check everything, and never decide while your temper is up.

chong_universal.line: Today clashes with people born in the Year of the {animal}. If that's your year, hold off on the big moves. If not, carry on as usual.

he_personal.line: Today is in harmony with your birth year — an extra tailwind all day long. That important matter you've been saving for the right moment? Move on it today. People around you are more ready than usual to take your side.

he_universal.line: Today gives bonus points to anyone born in the Year of the {animal}. If that's your year, push the important things forward at full strength.

harm_personal.line: There's an undercurrent between today and your chart — nothing breaks, but plenty niggles. Watch for crossed wires and missed appointments, and confirm every meeting one more time.

direction_use.wealth: For money matters today, face {dir} or take your business that way — it gives you the edge
direction_use.noble: Meeting seniors, negotiating, interviewing — head {dir} and a helping hand will find you
direction_use.joy: Celebrations, key appointments, happy beginnings — {dir} adds extra power today
direction_use.fortune: Trying your luck or opening a new door? Go {dir} before anywhere else
direction_use.avoid: {dir} runs against the grain today — steer important business away from that direction

color_line: Today's lucky colors: {colors}. Wear even one piece to pull the day's good rhythm your way

season_boost.spring: The trees are leafing out and growing energy runs high — fresh starts and anything meant to grow get the wind behind them
season_boost.summer: Summer fire blazes — showing up and stepping into the spotlight get extra power, but a hot temper is the enemy
season_boost.autumn: Harvest-season steel is sharp and clear — decisions and gathering in results hit their perfect rhythm now
season_boost.winter: Winter water runs deep and still — planning and long-game thinking beat any rushed move
